title: Planespotters Gather To Catch Glimpse Of Air Force

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Planespotters gather to catch glimpse of Air Force One. Thousands of people have gathered at Prestwick Airport to watch Donald Trump's arrival onboard Air Force One.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Planespotters gather to catch glimpse of Air Force One
